_comment: Source recipe read by `echodev init` and printed to stdout. Not copied to consumer repos.

hooks.command: test -d .echodev && command -v echodev >/dev/null 2>&1 && echodev recall --from-stdin --quiet --format text || true
test -d .echodev && command -v echodev >/dev/null 2>&1 && git rev-parse HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1 && echodev extract HEAD --kind commit --llm auto || true
